basic_details.organization_name: National Backward Classes Finance & Development Corporation (NBCFDC)
basic_details.short_information: National Backward Classes Finance & Development Corporation (NBCFDC) has officially announced the Consultant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 10 July 2026 on the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 35 years and hold a Master's Degree in any discipline along with relevant experience in implementation, monitoring, evaluation of government schemes/projects, portal operations, data management, and coordination activities can submit their applications through offline mode on or before 25 July 2026. Direct links to download the

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 31-07-2026. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.details: Master's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution. 2 years of experience in implementation, monitoring, and evaluation of Government schemes/projects. Experience in Portal operations, data management, and beneficiary database management. Experience in coordination with academic institutions, Government departments, implementing agencies, and other stakeholders. Understanding of administrative procedures, scheme guidelines, and monitoring mechanisms. Experience in preparation of reports, documentation, official correspondence, and inter-agency communication.

salary_details.details: Competitive salary commensurate with qualification and experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NBCFDC Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:nbcfdc.gov.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NBCFDC Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NBCFDC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NBCFDC Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NBCFDC Consultant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Master's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution. 2 years of experience in implementation, monitoring, and evaluation of Government schemes/projects. Experience in Portal operations, data management, and beneficiary database management. Experience in coordination with academic institutions, Government departments, implementing agencies, and other stakeholders. Understanding of administrative procedures, scheme guidelines, and monitoring mechanisms. Experience in preparation of reports, documentation, official correspondence, and inter-agency communication.

content_sections.heading: NBCFDC Consultant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 31-07-2026. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: NBCFDC Consultant Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Competitive salary commensurate with qualification and experience.

content_sections.heading: NBCFDC Consultant Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NBCFDC Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:nbcfdc.gov.in . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NBCFDC Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NBCFDC Consultant position is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University or Institution to be eligible for the Consultant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant post is 35 years as of 31st July 2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant post in the National Backward Classes Finance & Development Corporation (NBCFDC) recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NBCFDC Consultant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Consultant position?
faq.answer: The Consultant position at NBCFDC is a contractual job, offering a fixed-term employment opportunity.

faq.question: Q8. What experience is required for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience is required in areas such as scheme implementation, monitoring, data management, and coordination with various stakeholders.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant pages on the NBCFDC website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Consultant position is competitive and will be commensurate with the candidate's qualifications and relevant experience.
